description: Use this API to specify the parameters of the scales used for plotting the results of PV and QV analysis. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. setfullviewscale(scale, ltval, rbval, adjust, axisplace, axisvalue, gridcalctype, gridstep, gridminlines, shownum, ltpos, inpos, rbpos, ltplaces, inplaces, rbplaces)
python_syntax: setfullviewscale(scale, ltval, rbval, adjust, axisplace, axisvalue, gridcalctype, gridstep, gridminlines, shownum, ltpos, inpos, rbpos, ltplaces, inplaces, rbplaces)

parameters.name: ltval
parameters.description: Left value (for horizontal scale) or top value (for vertical scale). (input).

parameters.name: rbval
parameters.description: Right value (for horizontal scale) or bottom value (for vertical scale). (input).

parameters.name: axisvalue
parameters.description: Place of the axis. valid only in case axisplace = 1. (input).

parameters.name: gridstep
parameters.description: Tep of the grid. valid only in case gridcalctype = 0. (input).

parameters.name: gridminlines
parameters.description: Minimum number of the grid lines. valid only in case gridcalctype = 1. (input).

parameters.name: ltpos
parameters.description: Place of the left (top) value relative to the left (top) border. (input).

parameters.name: inpos
parameters.description: Place of the intermediate values relative to the intermediate grid lines. (input).

parameters.name: rbpos
parameters.description: Place of the right (bottom) value relative to the right (bottom) border. (input).

parameters.name: ltplaces
parameters.description: Number of digits to the right of the decimal point for the left (top) value. (input).

parameters.name: inplaces
parameters.description: Number of digits to the right of the decimal point for intermediate values. (input).

parameters.name: rbplaces
parameters.description: Number of digits to the right of the decimal point for the right (bottom) value. (input).

scale.description: QV analysis, horizontal scale for Q(V) plot.
QV analysis, vertical scale for Q(V) plot.
QV analysis, vertical scale for mismatch plot.
PV analysis, horizontal scale for incremental transfer.
PV analysis, horizontal scale for interface MW flow (bus voltage against interface flow).
PV analysis, vertical scale for bus voltage.
PV analysis, vertical scale for generator MW.
PV analysis, vertical scale for branch MVA flow.
PV analysis, vertical scale for interface MW flow.
PV analysis, vertical scale for bus voltage (bus voltage against interface flow).

adjust.description: to adjust (or not) the left (top) value of the scale.
to adjust (or not) the right (bottom) value of the scale.

axisplace.description: the axis place is set in AXISVALUE.
undefined, the exact value will be calculated.

gridcalctype.description: grid step is set in GRIDSTEP.
grid is defined by minimum grid lines set in GRIDMINLINES.

shownum.description: to show (or not) the left (top) value of the scale.
to show (or not) all the intermediate values for the grid.
to show (or not) the right (bottom) value of the scale.

ltpos.description: to the left of the border (above the border).
to the right of the border (below the border).

inpos.description: to the left of the line (above the line).
to the right of the line (below the line).

rbpos.description: to the left of the border (above the border).
to the right of the border (below the border).
